type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The reported releases of PM decreased in 2012 relative to 2011.  This decrease was the result of a decreased number of vehicle-kilometers travelled on unpaved roads at the facility in 2012, which serves to decrease the particulate matter from re-entrained road dust.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The reported releases of PM10 decreased in 2012 relative to 2011.  This decrease was the result of a decreased number of vehicle-kilometers travelled on unpaved roads at the facility in 2012, which serves to decrease the particulate matter from re-entrained road dust.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The reported releases of PM2.5 decreased in 2012 relative to 2011.  This decrease was the result of a decreased number of vehicle-kilometers travelled on unpaved roads at the facility in 2012, which serves to decrease the particulate matter from re-entrained road dust.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The reported releases of PM2.5 were similar between 2011 and 2010 (<10% change), since the effects of the decreased road dust contribution does not greatly affect the PM2.5 releases.
